subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Ocean hath desired to send unto thee the ocean of divine knowledge, that thou mayest behold the hidden pearls therein and become of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البحر الاعظم اراد ان یرسل الیک بحر العرفان لتری اللئالی المکنونه فیه و تکون من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
